ddls:
CREATE TABLE "patients" (
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each patient */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the patient */,
  "sex" TEXT /* Sex of the patient */,
  "chest_pain_type" TEXT /* Type of chest pain experienced by the patient */,
  "blood_pressure" INTEGER /* Blood pressure of the patient */,
  "cholesterol" INTEGER /* Cholesterol level of the patient */,
  "fasting_blood_sugar" INTEGER /* Fasting blood sugar level of the patient */,
  "resting_ecg" TEXT /* Resting ECG result of the patient */,
  "max_heart_rate" INTEGER /* Maximum heart rate of the patient */,
  "angina" INTEGER /* Presence of angina in the patient */,
  "peak" REAL /* Peak exercise ST segment of the patient */,
  "slope" TEXT /* Slope of the patient */,
  "#colored_vessels" INTEGER /* Number of colored vessels in the patient */,
  "thal" TEXT /* Thalassemia type of the patient */,
  "class" TEXT /* Class of the patient (Sick or Healthy) */,
  "medical_history_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key to the medical histories table */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the patient record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the patient record was last updated */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version number to track changes over time */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the professional who created the patient record */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the professional who last updated the patient record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("patient_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_patients_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by") REFERENCES medical_professionals ("professional_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_patients_medical_history_id FOREIGN KEY ("medical_history_id") REFERENCES medical_histories ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_patients_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES medical_professionals ("professional_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "medical_professionals" (
  "professional_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each medical professional */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the medical professional */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the medical professional */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the medical professional (e.g., doctor, nurse, researcher) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department in which the professional works */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the professional record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the professional record was last updated */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the professional who created the professional record */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the professional who last updated the professional record */,
  "permission_level" TEXT /* Permission level of the professional */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("professional_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_medical_professionals_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES medical_professionals ("professional_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_medical_professionals_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by") REFERENCES medical_professionals ("professional_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "medical_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each medical report */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient the report belongs to */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date the report was created */,
  "report_text" TEXT /* Text of the medical report */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the professional who created the report */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the professional who last updated the report */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the report was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the report was last updated */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version number to track changes over time */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_medical_reports_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES medical_professionals ("professional_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_medical_reports_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_medical_reports_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by") REFERENCES medical_professionals ("professional_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "treatments" (
  "treatment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each treatment */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient the treatment belongs to */,
  "treatment_name" TEXT /* Name of the treatment */,
  "treatment_date" TEXT /* Date the treatment was prescribed */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the professional who prescribed the treatment */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the professional who last updated the treatment */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the treatment was prescribed */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the treatment was last updated */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version number to track changes over time */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the treatment (e.g., ongoing, completed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("treatment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_treatments_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_treatments_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES medical_professionals ("professional_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_treatments_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by") REFERENCES medical_professionals ("professional_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "diagnoses" (
  "diagnosis_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each diagnosis */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient the diagnosis belongs to */,
  "diagnosis_name" TEXT /* Name of the diagnosis */,
  "diagnosis_date" TEXT /* Date the diagnosis was made */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the professional who made the diagnosis */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the professional who last updated the diagnosis */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the diagnosis was made */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the diagnosis was last updated */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version number to track changes over time */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the diagnosis (e.g., confirmed, provisional) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("diagnosis_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_diagnoses_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES medical_professionals ("professional_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_diagnoses_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_diagnoses_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by") REFERENCES medical_professionals ("professional_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient being accessed */,
  "professional_id" INTEGER /* ID of the medical professional accessing the patient data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the patient data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the access event occurred */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_professional_id FOREIGN KEY ("professional_id") REFERENCES medical_professionals ("professional_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient the alert belongs to */,
  "alert_date" TEXT /* Date the alert was created */,
  "alert_text" TEXT /* Text of the alert */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the professional who created the alert */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the alert was created */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the alert (e.g., active, resolved) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES medical_professionals ("professional_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "medical_histories" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each medical history */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient the history belongs to */,
  "history_text" TEXT /* Detailed medical history of the patient */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the history was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the history was last updated */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the professional who created the history */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the professional who last updated the history */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_medical_histories_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES medical_professionals ("professional_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_medical_histories_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by") REFERENCES medical_professionals ("professional_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_medical_histories_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id")
)
